tools.name: Todoist
tools.description: The smart task list that keeps your whole life in sync.
tools.longDescription: Todoist is the task management app that helps you organize everything from big projects to small errands. Natural language input, recurring due dates, and cross-platform sync mean you'll never miss a beat.

tools.name: Notion
tools.description: Your flexible workspace for notes, wikis, and databases.
tools.longDescription: Notion combines notes, tasks, wikis, and databases into a single, flexible workspace. Build custom workflows for your team or personal knowledge management with powerful block-based editing.

tools.name: Linear
tools.description: The beautifully fast issue tracker your team will actually enjoy.
tools.longDescription: Linear is purpose-built for modern software teams to track issues, manage projects, and ship faster. Keyboard-first, beautifully minimal, and blazing fast. Track sprints, automate workflows, and measure velocity.

tools.name: Asana
tools.description: Manage team work across projects with clarity and accountability.
tools.longDescription: Asana helps teams orchestrate their work — from daily tasks to strategic initiatives. With timeline, portfolio, and workload views, everyone knows what to do and why it matters.

tools.name: Notion AI
tools.description: AI writing assistant built directly into your workspace.
tools.longDescription: Notion AI writes, summarizes, and brainstorms with you — right inside your notes, docs, and wikis. Ask it anything, generate drafts, or clean up rough notes in seconds.

tools.name: Obsidian
tools.description: A second brain for your notes — powerful, local, extensible.
tools.longDescription: Obsidian is a markdown-based note-taking app that links your thoughts together. Graph view, 50+ community plugins, and your data stays on your machine. Perfect for knowledge management.

tools.name: Anytype
tools.description: The local-first office suite. Docs, tasks, wikis — yours alone.
tools.longDescription: Anytype is a local-first, end-to-end encrypted workspace for notes, tasks, and collaboration. No account required. Your data lives on your device — not in the cloud.

tools.name: Fibery
tools.description: Customizable workspace that grows with how your team works.
tools.longDescription: Fibery is a no-code platform where you build your own workspaces — combine docs, databases, automations, and custom entities. Start with templates or design from scratch.

tools.name: Slite
tools.description: Simple docs for teams who want to move fast without the clutter.
tools.longDescription: Slite gives your team a place to write, share, and find knowledge — without the overhead of Notion. Clean editor, powerful search, and channels that keep context together.

tools.name: Headspace
tools.description: Mindfulness made simple — for beginners and seasoned meditators.
tools.longDescription: Headspace makes meditation approachable with guided sessions for sleep, focus, stress, and anxiety. Created by monks and scientists, hundreds of exercises train your mind like a muscle.

tools.name: MyFitnessPal
tools.description: Your daily companion for nutrition, exercise, and healthier habits.
tools.longDescription: MyFitnessPal is the world's most popular calorie counter — log meals from a database of 14 million foods, scan barcodes, and sync with fitness devices. Build habits that last.

tools.name: Sleep Cycle
tools.description: Wake up naturally, at the perfect moment in your sleep cycle.
tools.longDescription: Sleep Cycle analyzes your sleep patterns via microphone and accelerometer, waking you during light sleep so you feel refreshed. Detailed sleep insights every night.

tools.name: Calm
tools.description: The app for rest, relaxation, and better sleep.
tools.longDescription: Calm is a mindful escape — sleep stories, guided meditation, breathing exercises, and exclusive audio from celebrities and experts. 100+ original Sleep Stories narrated by familiar voices.

tools.name: Whoop
tools.description: The fitness tracker built for elite performance and recovery.
tools.longDescription: Whoop is a wrist-worn strap that measures strain, recovery, and sleep with medical-grade accuracy. Daily Recovery score tells you exactly how hard you can push today.

tools.name: Noom
tools.description: Psychology-backed weight loss that changes habits permanently.
tools.longDescription: Noom uses cognitive behavioral science to help you build sustainable habits — not just diet. Color-coded food logging, daily coaching, and a supportive community that keeps you going.

tools.name: Aura Health
tools.description: Personalized meditation and mindfulness — 5 minutes a day.
tools.longDescription: Aura delivers a personalized meditation for your mood, stress level, and goals — every morning. Curated by world-class coaches, therapists, and teachers. Millions of sessions delivered.

tools.name: YNAB
tools.description: Take control of your money with the budgeting method that works.
tools.longDescription: You Need A Budget follows four rules: assign every dollar a job, embrace your true expenses, roll with the punches, and age your money. Join 3 million people who budget the happy way.

tools.name: Splitwise
tools.description: Split bills, track IOUs, and keep group finances perfectly fair.
tools.longDescription: Splitwise simplifies splitting bills with roommates, friends, and family. Track who owes what, get reminders to settle up, and export to spreadsheets. 130+ currencies supported.

tools.name: Personal Capital
tools.description: See your full financial picture — net worth, investments, retirement.
tools.longDescription: Personal Capital gives you a complete picture of your finances — for free. See your net worth at a glance, track investments, plan for retirement, and get personalized advice when you're ready.

tools.name: Monzo
tools.description: The bank that lives on your phone — transparent, smart, human.
tools.longDescription: Monzo is a UK digital bank with no fees, instant notifications, and a beautiful app. Manage your money, set budgets, split bills, and track spending in real time.

tools.name: Revolut
tools.description: The all-in-one financial super-app for spending, saving, and investing.
tools.longDescription: Revolut gives you a global money card, currency exchange at interbank rates, crypto trading, vault savings, and budgeting tools — all in one beautiful app.

tools.name: Copilot
tools.description: Your personal AI finance coach — tracks spending and gives clear advice.
tools.longDescription: Copilot is a beautifully designed budgeting app that uses AI to categorize your spending, find patterns, and give you actionable advice. Connect all your accounts in one place.

tools.name: Mint
tools.description: Free personal finance tracking — budgets, goals, and your credit score.
tools.longDescription: Mint pulls all your accounts, cards, and investments into one dashboard. It automatically categorizes spending, alerts you to unusual charges, and tracks progress toward financial goals.

tools.name: Beeper
tools.description: Every chat app, one inbox. No more switching tabs.
tools.longDescription: Beeper unifies 15+ chat networks into one gorgeous app. WhatsApp, Signal, Telegram, Slack, Discord, iMessage, and more — all searchable, all yours. No more tab switching.

tools.name: Twist
tools.description: Thoughtful communication for teams that value focused work.
tools.longDescription: Twist is built for teams who value deep focus over constant notifications. Channels keep conversations organized, threads stay threaded, and do-not-disturb mode actually works.

tools.name: Discord
tools.description: Where your community gathers — voice, text, and video, any scale.
tools.longDescription: Discord is the go-to platform for communities of all sizes. Rich voice channels, organized text forums, video calls, screen share, and powerful moderation tools — all free.

tools.name: Slack
tools.description: Where work happens — organized conversations, integrations, and speed.
tools.longDescription: Slack brings the right people, information, and tools together so you can get more done. Channels, DMs, shared files, and 2,500+ app integrations — all searchable.

tools.name: Telegram
tools.description: Fast, secure, and cloud-based — messaging done right.
tools.longDescription: Telegram delivers messages faster than any app — sync across all your devices, secret chats with end-to-end encryption, channels with unlimited members, and a powerful API.

tools.name: Signal
tools.description: Private messaging for everyone — no ads, no tracking, no compromise.
tools.longDescription: Signal is the gold standard for private messaging — end-to-end encryption by default, no data collected, open-source, and funded by a nonprofit foundation. Your messages stay yours.

tools.name: Warp
tools.description: The terminal that thinks it's a modern editor — AI-powered, beautiful.
tools.longDescription: Warp is a GPU-accelerated terminal that feels like a modern text editor. Autocomplete, command blocks, shared workflows, and an AI copilot built into the command line.

tools.name: Duolingo
tools.description: Learn a language through play — free, fun, and surprisingly effective.
tools.longDescription: Duolingo makes language learning feel like a game. Short, bite-sized lessons adapt to your learning style, AI-powered explanations fix mistakes instantly, and streaks keep you motivated.

tools.name: Khan Academy
tools.description: Free world-class education for anyone, anywhere.
tools.longDescription: Khan Academy offers free lessons in math, science, economics, history, and more — all mapped to standards and taught through videos, articles, and thousands of practice problems.

tools.name: Anki
tools.description: Master anything with flashcards that know when you're about to forget.
tools.longDescription: Anki uses spaced repetition to help you memorize anything efficiently. Create flashcard decks with text, images, and audio. Synced across all your devices. Used by med students and pilots alike.

tools.name: Brilliant
tools.description: Build intuition for math and science through interactive problem-solving.
tools.longDescription: Brilliant replaces passive videos with interactive explorations that build deep understanding. Courses in math foundations, logic, probability, and scientific thinking — taught visually.

tools.name: Memrise
tools.description: Learn a language with real people and real-world videos.
tools.longDescription: Memrise uses videos of native speakers and AI-powered review algorithms to make language learning feel natural. Learn vocabulary through context, not just flashcards.

tools.name: Coursera
tools.description: Degrees and certificates from top universities — online and free.
tools.longDescription: Coursera partners with 200+ universities and companies to offer online courses, professional certificates, and degrees. Audit courses free, or pay for graded assignments and certificates.

tools.name: Readwise
tools.description: Remember everything you read — highlights sync and review automatically.
tools.longDescription: Readwise imports highlights from your Kindle, Pocket, Instapaper, and 30+ sources — then surfaces them for daily review via spaced repetition. Never lose a great passage again.

tools.name: Spotify
tools.description: Every song, every podcast, every mood — all in one place.
tools.longDescription: Spotify gives you access to over 100 million songs and 5 million podcasts. AI-powered recommendations, collaborative playlists, and offline listening — all in a beautiful app.

tools.name: Kindle
tools.description: Your library, lighter than a single paperback.
tools.longDescription: Kindle lets you read millions of books on a device built for readers. Adjustable fonts, weeks of battery life, no glare in sunlight. Your entire library in your pocket.

tools.name: Letterboxd
tools.description: Track, review, and discover films with a community that loves cinema.
tools.longDescription: Letterboxd is where film lovers track what they watch, write reviews, create lists, and connect with other cinephiles. Browse the collections of tastemakers, follow friends, and find your next film.

tools.name: Steam
tools.description: Your portal to 50,000+ games — community, cloud saves, and sales.
tools.longDescription: Steam is the world's largest PC gaming platform. Buy, play, and discuss games with a community of over 1 billion members. Cloud saves, workshop mods, and legendary seasonal sales.

tools.name: Twitch
tools.description: Watch live streams, discover creators, and join communities.
tools.longDescription: Twitch is the world's leading live streaming platform — watch gamers, musicians, artists, and creators go live. Chat with viewers, cheer with bits, and subscribe to support your favorites.

tools.name: Goodreads
tools.description: Your home for books — track reading, find recommendations, join discussions.
tools.longDescription: Goodreads is the world's largest site for readers — track what you read, write reviews, see what friends are reading, and get personalized recommendations from a community of 90M book lovers.

tools.name: Archive of Our Own
tools.description: A fan-created, fan-run archive of fanworks — transformative works welcome.
tools.longDescription: AO3 is an open-source archive hosting over 11 million fan works in 50,000+ fandoms. A non-profit, donor-supported platform built by fans, for fans — entirely free, no ads.

tools.name: IMDb
tools.description: The world's most trusted source for movie, TV, and celebrity info.
tools.longDescription: IMDb is your guide to what's on TV and in theaters — millions of movies, shows, and actors, with trailers, reviews, cast info, trivia, and where to watch legally online.

categories.label: Productivity
categories.description: Get more done with less friction.

categories.label: Wellbeing
categories.description: Mind, body, and habit tools for a better you.

categories.label: Finance
categories.description: Tools for earning, saving, and growing.

categories.label: Connection
categories.description: Stay in touch with people and communities.

categories.label: Learning
categories.description: Acquire new skills and deepen knowledge.
